other_observers: Mark Peterson; We found this bird.
specific_location: Pueblo Reservoir at State Wildlife Area on Northwest side of the reservoir.
description: A medium-sized white heron/egret like bird. Which the feathers were off white in color, with two toned bill. Black on the tip of the bill and grayish blue on the base of the bill. The bird had yellow above the eyes. The bird had dark tips to wings. Though, it was a whitish bird. The legs were greenish yellow.Behaviors: The bird was wading in the water.Call: nonePlumage: juvenile
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
